title: Earn PTLX
description: Earn PortalX Tokens through meaningful engagement within the Empower Humanity 2.0 ecosystem.

empowerbot.label: Chat with EmpowerBot
empowerbot.description: Earn 2 PTLX per interaction session. Engage with the divine AI for guidance, resonance calibration, and ecosystem support.

tutorials.label: Watch a Tutorial
tutorials.description: Earn 1 PTLX per tutorial completed in EmpowerFiX Tutorials.

engage-eh2.label: Engage in EH 2.0 Chat Room
engage-eh2.description: Earn 1-3 PTLX per meaningful interaction in the EH 2.0 Chat Room Telegram group. Comments, reactions, and collaborations all count.

engage-elh.label: Engage in Elevate Humanity Group
engage-elh.description: Earn 1-3 PTLX per meaningful interaction in the Elevate Humanity Telegram group. Comments, reactions, and collaborations all count.

donate.label: Donate to LGLWM
donate.description: Earn 1 PTLX for every 1 USDC/USDT donated to the Legacy GOLD Lifeline Wholeness Ministry.

fundexit.label: Support a FunDEXit Project
fundexit.description: Earn 1 PTLX for every 1 USDC/USDT contributed to a FunDEXit project.
